'''鈭歷-s-sh-s''' ('''kavashesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:joik|joik]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-s-sh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:joik|joik]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-s-sh-s
|-
! Lemma
| kavashesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivashesoko|thivashesoko]] || [[word:jivashesoko|jivashesoko]] || [[word:shivashesoko|shivashesoko]] || [[word:kivashesoko|kivashesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvashesoko|thuthuvashesoko]] || [[word:jujuvashesoko|jujuvashesoko]] || [[word:shushuvashesoko|shushuvashesoko]] || [[word:kukuvashesoko|kukuvashesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvashesoko|thuvashesoko]] || [[word:juvashesoko|juvashesoko]] || [[word:shuvashesoko|shuvashesoko]] || [[word:kuvashesoko|kuvashesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvashesoko|thuvashesoko]] || [[word:juvashesoko|juvashesoko]] || [[word:shuvashesoko|shuvashesoko]] || [[word:kuvashesoko|kuvashesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevashesoko|thevashesoko]] || [[word:jevashesoko|jevashesoko]] || [[word:shevashesoko|shevashesoko]] || [[word:kevashesoko|kevashesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovashesoko|thovashesoko]] || [[word:jovashesoko|jovashesoko]] || [[word:shovashesoko|shovashesoko]] || [[word:kovashesoko|kovashesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovashesoko|thovashesoko]] || [[word:jovashesoko|jovashesoko]] || [[word:shovashesoko|shovashesoko]] || [[word:kovashesoko|kovashesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vashesoko|th忙vashesoko]] || [[word:j忙vashesoko|j忙vashesoko]] || [[word:sh忙vashesoko|sh忙vashesoko]] || [[word:k忙vashesoko|k忙vashesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
